creator: arnaud@pnzone.net
text:
It's not possible to compile duplicity with the Google Drive backend option enabled due to a broken dependency to py27-gdata-2.0.18.

Port tree is up2date.

# uname -a
FreeBSD icecube.pnzone.net 10.3-RELEASE-p7 FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p7 #21 r304219: Tue Aug 16 15:50:13 CEST 2016     root@icecube.pnzone.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/ICE3K  amd64

# make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for duplicity-0.7.09:
     CLOUDFILES=on: Install CloudFiles backend
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
     FTP=on: Install FTP backend
     FTPS=on: Install FTPS backend
     GDOCS=on: Install Google Docs backend
     GIO=off: Install GIO backend
     NLS=on: Native Language Support
     S3=off: Install Amazon S3 backend
====> Install SSH/SCP/SFTP backend
     PARAMIKO=on: Install python ssh implementation
     PEXPECT=off: Install pexpect and use ssh binaries
====> Install GnuPG: you have to select exactly one of them
     GNUPG=off: Install GnuPG 1
     GNUPG2=on: Install GnuPG 2
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings

# make reinstall
===>  Installing for duplicity-0.7.09
===>   duplicity-0.7.09 depends on package: py27-lockfile>=0 - found
===>   duplicity-0.7.09 depends on package: py27-cloudfiles>0 - found
===>   duplicity-0.7.09 depends on package: ncftp>=3.2.2 - found
===>   duplicity-0.7.09 depends on package: lftp>=3.7.15 - found
===>   duplicity-0.7.09 depends on package: py27-gdata>0 - not found
===>  py27-gdata-2.0.18 is marked as broken: Unfetchable (google code has
gone away).
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[3]: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/py-gdata
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/sysutils/duplicity
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/sysutils/duplicity
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/sysutils/duplicity
